measure.note: MEASURE (post-run, out-of-band, non-blocking; folds into optimize/substrate/measure.w0-pedagogy.json for TRIAGE, parallel to the run's own checks.post). Asserts the Wave-0 output contract's mandatory header line exists at all (SKILL.md Wave-0 output, the `lesson kind:` declaration every downstream wave keys off). Presence only — whether the DECLARED kind is honest for the brief's content is a soft-judge call (criteria.md C1).

Structural floor: at least one `discovery:` line exists anywhere in the artifact (the per-cue vocabulary SKILL.md's Wave-0 output mandates, in order, per cue). A run that abandoned the cue-block shape entirely fails here. NOT sufficient to prove every cue carries one — see the FOLLOW-ON note below (no regex-count CHECK_KIND exists yet to assert 1:1 balance across discovery/stage/focal/reinforcement).
Same structural floor as discovery-field-present, for the `stage:` line (concrete|represent|symbolize per SKILL.md §3).
Same structural floor, for the `focal:` line (the one changing element per SKILL.md §6).
Same structural floor, for the `reinforcement:` line (SKILL.md §8 — REASONED per cue, never templated; presence only, reasoning quality is criteria.md C5).

VALIDATED against a real known-bad artifact: `_prior-runs/kptest-fenyuhe-six/pedagogy.PRE-FIX.md` carries a literal '## Audit checklist' section (9 numbered self-audit items) baked into the artifact — this check FIRES on that file and PASSES on the real fixed gold (lesson-data/kptest-fenyuhe-six/pedagogy.md). Catches prompt.md's own named anti-pattern: 'Put ALL self-audit / self-check / ✓-checklist ... in your structured return ... NEVER as prose sections inside the artifact.' A verbose self-audit stalls the downstream model reading pedagogy.md as a spec.
